hyperedges.label: Brand token system applied across every brand surface
Plate drop + chalk smoke animation pipeline
Free-teardown funnel across marketing copy and site CTAs

nodes.label: index.html — Production Landing Page
nodes.rationale: Dependency-free static rebuild of the design-tool reference: all markup plus inline SVGs (plate, logo, dumbbell sprite); behavior lives in main.js, design system in styles.css.

nodes.label: Plate Stage Markup (chalk pile + 3D plate + smoke field)
nodes.norm_label: plate stage markup (chalk pile + 3d plate + smoke field)

nodes.label: Teardown Contact Form (#teardown-form)
nodes.rationale: Defaults to mailto: so nothing is stored and no backend is needed; setting FORM_ENDPOINT in main.js switches it to POSTing {name, website, email} as JSON with inline loading/success/error states.

nodes.label: Claude Code Handoff Guide
nodes.rationale: Design files are high-fidelity references (final colors, type, spacing, copy, animation specs) meant to be recreated in a target stack, not shipped as-is.

nodes.label: Deadlift Digital (web studio)
nodes.rationale: Two-person studio (Jake & Jose) building fixed-price small-business websites in 14 days so owners look established without agency prices or DIY headaches. Tagline: Websites that pull weight.

nodes.label: Brand Tokens (Plate Orange / Iron Black / Chalk)
nodes.rationale: Plate Orange #E85D26 is the single accent (CTAs + plate core only); Iron Black #141518/#17181A background; Chalk #F6F4F0 text. Archivo Black display, Space Grotesk body, IBM Plex Mono labels. A 5%-opacity fractal-noise grain overlay (mix-blend-mode: overlay) gives the gym-floor industrial texture; voice is plainspoken, zero jargon.
nodes.norm_label: brand tokens (plate orange / iron black / chalk)

nodes.label: 3D Spinning 45lb Plate Hero
nodes.rationale: Plate fixed at viewport center behind hero copy; a preserve-3d stack (front/back SVG faces with circumferential brand text + 13 rim layers) fakes solid depth without WebGL. Idle rotateY spin via rAF (~0.008 deg/ms) plus scroll-linked rotation (scrollY * 0.22 deg) ties motion to reading position.

nodes.label: Staggered Scroll Reveals ([data-reveal])
nodes.rationale: Elements rise 26px and fade in, staggered 90ms by data-reveal index, driven by IntersectionObserver; degrades to static under prefers-reduced-motion.

nodes.label: Headline Word-Split Reveal ([data-split])
nodes.rationale: Headlines animate word-by-word from a masked translateY(115%) with 45ms per-word delay, giving editorial weight to the Archivo Black display type.

nodes.label: Click Ring-Burst + Heading Jolt
nodes.rationale: Every click spawns an orange ring burst at the cursor and a subtle jolt scale on the nearest heading — tactile, gym-slam feedback consistent with the brand's physicality.

nodes.label: Orange Marquee Strip
nodes.rationale: Full-bleed Plate Orange band rotated -1 degree, infinite 30s linear loop with duplicated content and barbell glyph separators; carries the positioning one-liner as ambient repetition.

nodes.label: Pre-Launch Placeholders
nodes.rationale: Items that must be replaced before launch: phone (555) 045-0450, 'Project name' work cards / ADD SCREENSHOT tiles, founder photos (JK/JM monograms), and the NOW BOOKING month ticker.

nodes.label: Design Session Log (CHAT-LOG)
nodes.rationale: Eight-phase reconstruction of the design conversation (brand, v1, v2, mobile, playbook, handoff, Q&A, load animation) so a developer/agent can pick up where the design tool left off.

nodes.label: Plate Drop + Chalk Smoke Load Animation
nodes.rationale: Three iterations: (1) plate free-falls from -120vh on a 1250ms WAAPI track with gravity easing cubic-bezier(.6,0,.95,.45), impact at 56% offset, -32px/-9px rebounds, chalk pile squash + particle burst + dd-shake camera thud; (2) longer, more realistic chalk (22 puffs, surge clouds, haze, grit); (3) 'more like a cloud of smoke, less cartoony' — ~9 clusters of 3-4 overlapping dim blurred lobes (density from overlap, not bright edges) warped by an feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap filter, flat ground wash replacing the comic shockwave. Skipped under prefers-reduced-motion; toggleable via plateDrop flag.
nodes.norm_label: plate drop + chalk smoke load animation

nodes.label: Logo Explorations Canvas
nodes.rationale: Three rounds of concepts (24 marks: loaded bar, DD monogram, hex plate, bent bar, ASCII iron, negative-space D, etc.), plate-badge refinements, and brand applications (business cards, avatar/favicon sizes, homepage hero).

nodes.label: 45-Plate Badge Mark (1f, chosen)
nodes.rationale: Concentric circles reading as a barbell plate with an orange core — 'the badge of doing the work'. Chosen because it reads at any size from favicon to signage, and the orange core keeps a single point of color.

nodes.label: Website v1 (top-nav centered layout)
nodes.rationale: First full landing page: sticky top nav, right-side spinning plate hero, services/work/why/mission/contact sections. Superseded by v2 but kept as reference.

nodes.label: Website v2 (fixed-sidebar flagship)
nodes.rationale: Stronger, more distinctive layout than v1: fixed 224px left rail (logo, numbered mono nav, orange CTA, live clock ticker), centered hero over the 3D plate, rotated marquee, about/services/process/work/why/mission/contact sections. Tweak flags: plateDrop, plateSpin, showMarquee, showTicker.

nodes.label: v2 componentDidMount (clock, click FX, split, reveals, plate loop, drop track)
nodes.norm_label: v2 componentdidmount (clock, click fx, split, reveals, plate loop, drop track)

nodes.label: _chalkImpact(power) chalk-smoke particle system
nodes.rationale: Spawns all impact particles as WAAPI-animated DOM nodes scaled by power (1 = slam, 0.3 = rebound tap): ground wash, dense core mound, lobed smoke clusters, ground-hugging surge, lingering haze, grit specks; also squashes the chalk pile and fires the dd-shake camera thud on [data-shake] elements.

nodes.label: dd-smokefx Turbulence Filter (v2)
nodes.rationale: feTurbulence (fractalNoise, baseFrequency 0.011 0.017, 3 octaves, seed 7) + feDisplacementMap (scale 34) applied to the 1600x780px particle container so the whole chalk cloud warps into wisps instead of reading as discrete circles.

nodes.label: Mobile Layout Mockup (iPhone frame)
nodes.rationale: Mobile layout inside an ios-frame.jsx device: sticky top bar + hamburger, centered inline spinning plate, stacked sections, card-style form. Intended as the responsive breakpoint reference when porting.

nodes.label: Standalone Site Bundle (main deliverable)
nodes.rationale: Full desktop site bundled into one self-contained file (base64 asset manifest + JSON-escaped template) that opens directly in a browser with no server; includes the latest plate-drop + chalk-smoke load animation. Best file to iterate on or extract from.

nodes.label: Bundler Unpack Loader
nodes.rationale: Decodes the base64/gzip asset manifest to blob URLs, substitutes them into the JSON template, strips SRI/crossorigin (blob URLs from file:// have null origin), swaps the document root, and re-creates script tags so they execute in order.

nodes.label: Marketing Playbook
nodes.rationale: Positioning, brand identity, target customers (local service businesses, new launches, outdated SMB sites), offer ladder, channels in priority order (referrals, local SEO, before/after content, outbound teardowns, ads later), funnel, content pillars, first 90 days, and metrics that matter.

nodes.label: Positioning: We do the heavy lifting. You run your business.
nodes.rationale: Every message reinforces strength, reliability, no wasted motion. Against alternatives: vs DIY builders — done-for-you, done right; vs big agencies — fixed price, fast turnaround, a human you can call; vs freelancers — a real process and support after launch.
nodes.norm_label: positioning: we do the heavy lifting. you run your business.

nodes.label: Offer Ladder (Warm-up / Starter / Heavy / Spotter)
nodes.rationale: Free teardown is the lead magnet, Starter (5-page fixed-price site in 2 weeks) is the core offer, Heavy (custom design, copy, booking/e-commerce, local SEO) is the upsell, Spotter is monthly recurring revenue. Site services add 'Get found on Google' as a standalone offer.

nodes.label: Free Website Teardown
nodes.rationale: 5-minute video critique of a prospect's current site — personal, useful, hard to ignore. The single CTA repeated across every content piece and every site surface; the teardown format is the brand's signature content.

nodes.label: Funnel: SEE, GET, BOOK, BUY, STAY, REFER
nodes.rationale: SEE teardown content, GET free site teardown, BOOK 20-min call, BUY Starter/Heavy, STAY on Spotter plan, REFER (fee paid). One funnel, one CTA, repeated everywhere.
nodes.norm_label: funnel: see, get, book, buy, stay, refer

nodes.label: Spotter Plan (monthly care)
nodes.rationale: Hosting, security, updates, edits, and a plain-English monthly report — the recurring-revenue tier and step 4 of the site's process ('we stay behind the bar').
